title: Thread & Co
description: A Melbourne-based streetwear label selling through Instagram and markets. We built their content strategy around behind-the-scenes production content, growing their DTC sales by 180% in 6 months.
body:
## The Brief

Thread & Co is a small streetwear label run by two designers out of a Collingwood warehouse. They were selling well at weekend markets but couldn't translate that energy online. Instagram felt flat and wasn't driving sales.

## Our Approach

We repositioned their content strategy around the maker story. Instead of polished product shots, we focused on raw behind-the-scenes content: the screen printing process, fabric sourcing trips, packing orders at 2am before a drop.

We created a consistent posting cadence — 4 feed posts and 10+ Stories per week — and introduced a "Drop Day" content format on TikTok that built anticipation for each new release.

## The Results

In 6 months, Thread & Co grew from 2,100 to 18,000 Instagram followers. DTC online sales increased by 180%. Their engagement rate sits at 4.2% — well above industry average — because their audience feels like insiders, not just customers.
